nodes.label: Rationale: Field crews offline on construction sites cannot view snag lists without PowerSync

nodes.label: Rationale: Writes bypass PowerSync and go direct to Supabase to avoid local-write conflict resolution complexity in Phase 1

nodes.label: Rationale: Photo binaries are not synced through PowerSync — only S3 paths, to avoid binary blob sync complexity
nodes.norm_label: rationale: photo binaries are not synced through powersync — only s3 paths, to avoid binary blob sync complexity

nodes.label: Rationale: Sync rules mirror existing RLS policies — org_id JWT claim is the partition key so each user only syncs their org's data
nodes.norm_label: rationale: sync rules mirror existing rls policies — org_id jwt claim is the partition key so each user only syncs their org's data

nodes.label: Rationale: TanStack Query remains the query interface on top of PowerSync — minimises hook refactor surface

nodes.label: Rationale: usePermissions() hook feeds can*() functions — no prop-drilling, no new abstractions

nodes.label: Rationale: Middleware is the fast path for route blocking using JWT claim — avoids DB round-trip

nodes.label: Rationale: Section-level ErrorBoundary prevents a Sidebar crash from killing the whole page
